creator: freebsd-maintainer@opera.com
text:
This is a duplicate of ports/149714.

The bug is known to Opera, our bug ID is DSK-297249. The crash indeed only  
happens on FreeBSD and not on Linux. The bug has prioritized status.

It happens when Opera uses its GTK UI backend and the user is not running  
Gnome. It can be worked around by forcing Opera to use one of the other UI  
backends (pure X11 or KDE4) using opera:config#FileSelector|DialogToolkit  
- the choices are 0 (automatic, default), 1 (GTK), 3 (KDE4) and 4 (pure  
X11).

If you'd like to add anything to Opera's bug report, send a mail to  
nospam@bugs.opera.com, where you replace nospam with the ID I mentioned  
above.

Arjan

-- 
Using Opera's revolutionary e-mail client: http://www.opera.com/mail/
